title: Payer: handle Address → prompt confirm → send Sent
description: When a ClearMessage::Payment with action=Address arrives for a session where role=Payer and state=Requested: display '[payment] Address received from <handle>: <address>. Send payment then type /confirm <short_session_id> to confirm.' Transition state to AddressProvided. When user types '/confirm <short_id>': find matching session, send ClearMessage::Payment { session_id, action: PaymentAction::Sent { chain, tx_hash: 'stub-<uuid>', amount } }, transition state to Sent, echo '[payment] Sent (stub tx). Waiting for confirmation.'
